switch_tip: After enabling, users will receive a specified reply when following the official account. This feature only supports replies within the official account.
alert_message: After enabling, users will receive a specified reply when following the official account. {highlight}
alert_highlight: This feature only supports verified official accounts/service accounts.
empty_sub: Please go to System Settings > Official Account Management to bind an official account
modal_close_content: After closing, this feature will be disabled by default and all official account menus will stop working. Confirm to close?
